cell_id_format: algebraic A1–U15 (column letter + row number, row 1 at bottom)
detective_note: Slot 10 = at front door (K1). Engine: DETECTIVE_TRACK_MAX_STEPS = 10

special_cells.note_trap_draw: Trap cards are drawn only when landing on skull TRAP_ZONE cells, not from board draw squares

obstacles.note: Full mansion layout (rooms, corridors, décor) is generated programmatically in buildGrid21x15Board()
